{{Quote|That's [[Hong Kong Master|the]] [[London Master|Masters]] of the [[Hong Kong Sanctum|Hong Kong]] and [[London Sanctum]].|Rintrah|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}}
'''Rintrah''' is a [[Masters of the Mystic Arts|Master of the Mystic Arts]] and an apprentice at [[Kamar-Taj]].

==Biography==
===Master of the Mystic Arts===
====[[Siege of Kamar-Taj]]====
Rintrah originated from an alternate dimension before he crossed over to the earthly plane. While there, he went to [[Kamar-Taj]] and was trained to become a [[Masters of the Mystic Arts|Master of the Mystic Arts]], eventually becoming the apprentice to the Sorcerer Supreme.{{Ref|TAoDSitMoM}} In [[2024]], Rintrah was present in Kamar-Taj when [[Doctor Strange]] and [[Wong]] brought [[America Chavez]] there. He listened as Wong explained the history behind [[Scarlet Witch]] and when Strange told them that she had taken a [[Westview|town]] hostage. He and the rest of the Masters then prepared for battle. When the [[London Master]] and [[Hong Kong Master]] arrived through [[Inter-Dimensional Portal|portals]], Rintrah announced their arrival. 

Rintrah then witnessed when dark clouds appeared in the sky and floated above them, to unveil [[Scarlet Witch]] flying in the sky. He then watched when Strange went to speak with her. When Strange returned, Rintrah prepared to fight as Maximoff used her powers to break the mystical barriers. However, Rintrah, along with other sorcerers, were buried under rubble as the foundations of Kamar-Taj were destroyed.{{Ref|DSitMoM}}

====Attacked by Wanda Maximoff====
Rintrah and several other sorcerers were lifted from the rubble by [[Wanda Maximoff]] and she threatened to kill them in order to convince [[Wong]] to help her. Once he told her that the [[Darkhold]] was a copy and that she could find the original text at [[Mount Wundagore]], Maximoff released Rintrah and the other sorcerers.{{Ref|DSitMoM}}

====Rebuilding Kamar-Taj====
Later, Rintrah trained alongside [[America Chavez]] and other sorcerers as they begin to rebuild [[Kamar-Taj]].{{Ref|DSitMoM}}

==Powers==
*'''[[Magic]]''': As a [[Masters of the Mystic Arts|Master of the Mystic Arts]], Rintrah wielded magical abilities. He used these abilities in an attempt to stop [[Wanda Maximoff]] from entering [[Kamar-Taj]].
**'''[[Magic#Eldritch Magic 2|Eldritch Magic]]''': Rintrah is able to shape and manipulate [[Magic|Eldritch Magic]], forming tangible constructs of energy, such as weapons or shields, as well as cast spells by writing specific formations with the fiery energy.

==Facilities==
*'''[[Kamar-Taj]]''': Rintrah trained as a sorcerer in Kamar-Taj, and helped fortify the facility and defend it from the [[Scarlet Witch]]'s attack on [[America Chavez]].
